title: EARLY ESCALERA - 211info
text: LATINO NETWORK EARLY ESCALERA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF College and career preparation program. College visits, career exploration, and planning lessons to help understand the financial aid and scholarship process, high school credit support, STEM exploration, and leadership development. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Latino students in grades 9-10 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 283-6881 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benson, Centennial, David Douglas, Franklin, Gresham, Jefferson. McDaniel, Parkrose, Reynolds and Roosevelt High Schools Services: College/University Entrance Support * Hispanic/Latino Community Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS AL KINDER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS APRENDEMOS EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLEGIO DE PADRES/PARENTS COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ESCALERA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CRECIENDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PADRINOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SOÑANDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UNIDOS FOR OREGON LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALING INITIATIVE LEGAL SERVICES - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL NAVIGATOR SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CONEXIONES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - NINTH GRADE COUNTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - P3 COORDINATORS UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
